name: Epimedium Brevicornum
summary: Minimum source-backed intake for Epimedium brevicornum.
description: Minimum source-backed intake for Epimedium brevicornum. Active compounds include epimedin A, epimedin B, and epimedin C.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: significant heart rhythm or blood-pressure instability
interactions: Potential additive effects with PDE-5 inhibitors
